author: design-phase-1c-events-md-055e
content:
Decision: Using trait-based EventTree for propagation rather than a concrete tree type. This lets vitreous_layout and vitreous_widgets provide their own tree implementations without vitreous_events depending on them. The trait will have parent() and handler() methods.

Decision: Key enum covers standard web/desktop keys (letters, digits, F1-F24, navigation, media, modifiers, punctuation). KeyCode covers physical scan codes. Both derive Clone, Copy, Debug, PartialEq, Eq, Hash. This matches the Web KeyboardEvent model (key vs code) which is the most well-documented standard.

Decision: Geometry types (Point, Rect, Corners, NodeId) defined locally in types.rs since crate has zero deps. These are minimal — just what hit_test needs. Layout crate can define its own richer types later.
